---
title: ""
---

<div class="about-layout">

<div class="about-photo">
![](images/portrait.jpg){.portrait}
</div>

<div class="about-text">

## Your Name

Write a paragraph about yourself here. Where you're based, what drives your practice,
the materials or methods you work with. Keep it personal and direct — visitors
want to hear your voice, not a biography.

A second paragraph can go into more depth: influences, recurring themes, the
questions your work explores.

---

**Contact**\
[hello@yourname.com](mailto:hello@yourname.com)

**Instagram**\
[@yourhandle](https://instagram.com/yourhandle)

**CV**\
[Download PDF](cv.pdf)

</div>

</div>
